findings.evidence: `rg -n "def comp|theorem comp_assoc|theorem ext|structure Hom" code/TauCeti/Algebra/Coalgebra/Comodule.lean` shows the category-facing morphism API is already in `Comodule.lean`; `rg -n "Comodule\.Hom\.(zero|add|sum|comp_add|add_comp|nsmul)|∑|\+" code/TauCeti/Algebra/Coalgebra/ComoduleCat.lean` has no hits.
findings.fix: Change the import back to `import TauCeti.Algebra.Coalgebra.Comodule`; leave `TauCeti.lean` importing the new `Comodule.Hom` file if it should be exposed at the root.
findings.issue: `ComoduleCat.lean` imports `TauCeti.Algebra.Coalgebra.Comodule.Hom`, but this file only uses `Comodule.Hom`, `id`, `comp`, `ext`, and `toLinearMap` from the base comodule API, not the new additive instances or lemmas.

summary: The additive hom-set API is in a plausible child file, but the category file now imports it even though it only uses the base comodule morphism API already defined in `Comodule.lean`. Keep the dependency edge direct.
